title: agrostis alba var. palustris
intro: Agrostis alba var. palustris, also known as marsh bentgrass, is a perennial grass species found in wetland areas and is a variant of the Agrostis alba plant. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of marsh bentgrass include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Marsh bentgrass can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
